meta.attribution: Product data attributed to Product Hunt.
meta.commercialUsage: Product Hunt API must not be used for commercial purposes without Product Hunt approval.

issues.title: 产品灵感日报 · 20 个新品

products.name: Publora
products.tagline: A publishing API for agents to post on 10 social platforms
products.summaryZh: 面向智能体的发布API，支持在10个社交平台发帖
products.descriptionZh: Publora 是一个面向 10 个社交平台的发布 API。一次 REST API 调用即可处理多网络分发——无需 SDK，无需 OAuth 配置。内置的 MCP 服务器提供 18 个工具，让 Claude、Cursor 等 AI 代理能够完成完整的交互闭环：在 LinkedIn、X、Instagram、Threads、TikTok、YouTube、Facebook、Bluesky、Mastodon 和 Telegram 上发布、评论、互动、拉取分析数据。
products.description: Publora is a publishing API for 10 social platforms. One REST API call handles multi-network distribution — no SDKs, no OAuth wiring. The native MCP server with 18 tools gives AI agents like Claude and Cursor a full engagement loop: post, comment, react, pull analytics — across LinkedIn, X, Instagram, Threads, TikTok, YouTube, Facebook, Bluesky, Mastodon, and Telegram

products.name: TypingMind
products.tagline: Pay per use, no subscription, 18 model providers supported
products.summaryZh: 按使用量付费，无需订阅，支持18个模型提供商
products.descriptionZh: TypingMind 是使用 API 密钥调用大语言模型 AI 的最流行应用。它将来自 18 家提供商的所有最佳模型整合到一个强大的 AI 工作区中，无需为每个模型单独订阅付费。TypingMind 还提供了前所未有的 AI 体验，专注于专业用户的功能，如项目、分支/并行对话、插件/MCP/技能，以及大量在其他地方几乎找不到的可定制选项！立即访问 www.typingmind.com 试试吧 :)
products.description: TypingMind is the most popular app to use LLM AI models with API keys. It brings you all the best models across 18 providers in one powerful AI workspace without having to pay for subscriptions to each one. TypingMind also provides the best AI experience ever with features focused on pro users like Projects, Fork/Parallel chat, Plugins/MCP/Skills, and a wide range of customizable options that you literally cannot find anywhere else! Go give it a try at www.typingmind.com :)

products.name: Spotlight by Backplanes
products.tagline: Session reports for Claude Code & Codex to improve your code
products.summaryZh: Claude Code 和 Codex 的会话报告，用于改进你的代码
products.descriptionZh: 跟上你的智能体。Spotlight 读取你的 Claude Code 和 Codex 会话，展示智能体的实际行为，以及如何让每次会话都持续进步：现在需要修复什么，下次如何更好地交付，哪些值得分享。无论是一个工作流还是七个，个人使用还是团队协作。免费。
products.description: Keep up with your agents. Spotlight reads your Claude Code and Codex sessions and shows you what your agents actually did, and how to get recursively better every session: what to fix now, what to ship better next time, what's worth sharing. One harness or seven, solo or across your team. Free.

products.name: Screen Charm
products.tagline: Give your screen recordings more charm
products.summaryZh: 给你的屏幕录制增添更多魅力
products.descriptionZh: 录制屏幕，并借助智能缩放效果、流畅动态模糊、摄像头叠加、背景音乐及内置编辑器，将原始素材即时转化为精致、可展示的视频。无需复杂编辑工具，无需订阅。只需几分钟，即可获得干净、高质量的演示视频。支持最高4K导出，无论是展示产品、引导用户还是录制教程，都能分享真正专业的视频。一次购买，无需订阅。唯有ScreenCharm。
products.description: Record your screen and instantly turn raw footage into polished, presentation-ready videos with smart zoom effects, smooth motion blur, webcam overlay, background music, and a built-in editor. No complex editing tools. No subscriptions. Just clean, high-quality demos in minutes. Export in up to 4K and share videos that actually feel professional whether you're showcasing a product, onboarding users, or recording tutorials. One-time purchase. No subscription. Just ScreenCharm.

products.name: iArt.ai
products.tagline: Turn ideas & designs into stunning video/animation.
products.summaryZh: 将创意与设计转化为惊艳的视频与动画。
products.descriptionZh: 更快的智能体可制作推广/短视频、解说、动态文字及专业动态图形并配以音频。无需使用AE/PR/CapCut。通过对话优化并交付高影响力内容。
products.description: A faster agent delivers promos/shorts, explainers, kinetic type and PRO motion graphics with audio. Ditch AE/PR/CapCut. Chat to refine and ship impact.

products.name: BlenderHunt
products.tagline: The indie marketplace for Blender artists and creators
products.summaryZh: Blender艺术家与创作者的独立市场
products.descriptionZh: 一个精选市场，供Blender创作者发现、出售和购买来自全球独立艺术家的高质量插件、资产、材质和工具。
products.description: A curated marketplace for Blender creators to discover, sell, and purchase high-quality addons, assets, materials, and tools from independent artists worldwide.

products.name: Axol
products.tagline: Automate physical work with a powerful robot
products.summaryZh: 使用强大机器人实现体力工作自动化
products.descriptionZh: Axol是一款双臂机器人，专为使用物理AI实现实际工作自动化的团队设计。便捷的数据采集、长工作半径和高运动范围，意味着您可以自动化真正重要的工作。
products.description: Axol is a dual-arm robot designed for teams automating real work with physical AI. Easy data collection, long reach, and a high range of motion means you can automate work that matters.

products.name: SeaTicket
products.tagline: Al agent that resolves issues across all your channels
products.summaryZh: 跨所有渠道解决问题的AI代理
products.descriptionZh: 软件团队正淹没在GitHub、Discourse和邮件中零散问题的海洋里。有价值的反馈常被噪音掩盖。SeaTicket通过将这些信息同步至统一工作空间，重塑社区支持模式。其独特之处在于：完整上下文——解决问题时关联相关议题与文档；AI代理——内置代理基于现有文档和历史问题自动建议解决方案。停止挖掘上下文，开始解决问题。
products.description: Software teams are drowning in a sea of fragmented issues across GitHub, Discourse and emails. Valuable feedback is often buried under noise. SeaTicket transforms community support by syncing these into a single workspace. What makes it different? Full Context: Bring related issues and documents when solving an issue. AI Agents: Built-in agents autonomously suggest resolutions using existing documents and previous issues. Stop digging for context. Start resolving.

products.name: veridive
products.tagline: Find the 30 seconds that matter in any video via chat
products.summaryZh: 通过聊天找到任何视频中关键的30秒
products.descriptionZh: veridive 将 YouTube、播客、讲座和访谈转化为带引用的答案——精准定位到答案被说出的具体秒数。支持用任何语言提问！veridive 实时搜索、读取转录文本、按实际知识掌握程度对来源排序，并为每项主张提供可点击播放的引用答案。
products.description: veridive turns YouTube, podcasts, lectures and interviews into cited answers — pinpointed to the exact second the answer is spoken. Ask in any language! veridive searches live, reads the transcripts, ranks sources by who actually knows, and answers with a click-to-play citation on every claim.

products.name: Hero Studio Photos
products.tagline: Snap one photo, get listing-ready shots from every angle
products.summaryZh: 拍一张照片，即可获得从各个角度拍摄的、可直接上架的图片。
products.descriptionZh: 只需拍摄一张商品照片，Hero即可将其转化为各个角度的干净影棚级图片，包括服装的上身效果图及人台展示图。已在iOS和Android平台上线，并提供API和MCP服务器，方便开发者及AI代理在此基础上进行构建。
products.description: Snap one photo of whatever you're selling and Hero turns it into clean studio shots from every angle, including on-model and mannequin-style images for clothing. Live on iOS and Android, with an API and MCP server so developers and AI agents can build on it.

products.name: OLO Robotics
products.tagline: Control robots in your browser — no setup needed
products.summaryZh: 在浏览器中控制机器人——无需任何设置
products.descriptionZh: OLO 是一个基于网页的平台，为开发者、研究人员和学者提供编程机器人所需的一切——无需繁琐的配置。在浏览器中即可获得 ROS2 访问、机器人可视化、仿真和 AI 辅助编程。从想法到可运行的机器人只需 30 分钟，而非两周。无需安装 Linux，无需陷入配置迷宫。只有你、你的机器人，以及从第一天起就准备好的 JavaScript 或 Python SDK 游乐场。现已开放注册。
products.description: OLO is a web-based platform that gives developers, researchers, and academics everything they need to program robots — without the setup hell. Get ROS2 access, robot visualization, simulation and AI-assisted coding all in your browser. Go from idea to working robot in 30 minutes, not two weeks. No Linux installs. No config rabbit holes. Just you, your robot, and a JavaScript or Python SDK playground ready from day one. Now open for sign-ups.

products.name: AGNT.Hub
products.tagline: Build always-on AI agents without managing servers
products.summaryZh: 无需管理服务器，即可构建始终在线的AI智能体
products.descriptionZh: 大多数AI工具止步于聊天框。AGNT Hub为你提供运行在隔离云容器中的私有AI工作空间。添加自定义技能，通过MCP连接Notion等工具，一次性构建工作流。让智能体在后台运行，无需接触Docker、AWS或配置文件。
products.description: Most AI tools stop at the chat box. AGNT Hub gives you a private AI workspace running inside an isolated cloud container. Add custom skills, connect tools like Notion via MCP, and build workflows once. Let your agents run in the background without touching Docker, AWS, or config files.

products.name: LayerProof Vellum
products.tagline: One canvas for every image asset you need
products.summaryZh: 每个图像资产对应一个画布
products.descriptionZh: 使用LayerProof Vellum，将不可预测的AI图像生成转化为可控的生产流程。Vellum是LayerProof的拖放式可视化画布，专为希望工程化而非猜测图像的团队设计。在画布上连接主体、背景和效果，Vellum将其融合为像素完美的最终资产。
products.description: Turn unpredictable AI image generations into controlled production pipelines with LayerProof Vellum. Vellum is LayerProof’s drag-and-drop visual canvas for teams who want to engineer their images, not guess them. Plug your subject, background, and effects together on the canvas, and Vellum fuses them into a pixel-perfect final asset.

products.name: Zingle
products.tagline: Learn words in context with AI
products.summaryZh: 在语境中通过AI学习单词
products.descriptionZh: 在语境中学习单词。阅读故事与个人内容，借助AI理解词汇的上下文含义，并通过连贯的学习循环加深记忆。
products.description: Learn words where they make sense. Read stories and your own content, understand words in context with AI, and remember them through a connected learning loop.

products.name: fort
products.tagline: One command to audit and fix your Mac's security
products.summaryZh: 一条命令审计并修复Mac的安全性
products.descriptionZh: 大多数Mac安全工具需要安装代理、注册或MDM。fort不需要。一条命令即可检查15+项安全设置：FileVault、SIP、防火墙、屏幕锁定、本地管理员权限、Gatekeeper、SSH、AirDrop等。生成评分并自动修复大部分问题。单一二进制文件。无遥测。MIT许可。适合开发者加固自己的Mac，也适合团队在无需MDM负担的情况下准备SOC 2或ISO 27001认证。brew install djadmin/tap/fort
products.description: Most Mac security tools need agents, signups, or MDM. fort doesn't. One command checks 15+ security settings: FileVault, SIP, firewall, screen lock, local admin rights, Gatekeeper, SSH, AirDrop and more. Reports a score and fixes most issues automatically. Single binary. No telemetry. MIT licensed. Perfect for developers hardening their own Mac, and for teams preparing for SOC 2 or ISO 27001 without the MDM overhead. brew install djadmin/tap/fort

products.name: dochost
products.tagline: Turn Markdown and HTML into a live link
products.summaryZh: 将 Markdown 和 HTML 转换为可点击的链接。
products.descriptionZh: 秒级将HTML转为URL、Markdown转为HTML。免费HTML托管与Markdown托管，支持实时Markdown预览——粘贴即得链接，无需注册。
products.description: Turn HTML to URL and Markdown to HTML in seconds. A free HTML host and Markdown host with a live Markdown preview — paste, get a link, no signup.

products.name: Gemini 3.5 Live Translate
products.tagline: Latest audio model for live speech-to-speech translation
products.summaryZh: 最新音频模型，用于实时语音到语音翻译
products.descriptionZh: Gemini 3.5 Live Translate 为 Google AI Studio、Google Translate 和 Google Meet 带来近乎实时的自然语音翻译。
products.description: Gemini 3.5 Live Translate brings near real-time, natural speech translation to Google AI Studio, Google Translate and Google Meet.

products.name: Incorruptible by Eric Ries
products.tagline: Why good companies go bad and how great companies stay great
products.summaryZh: 优秀公司为何走向衰败，卓越公司如何保持长青
products.descriptionZh: 埃里克·莱斯（Eric Ries，《精益创业》作者）的《永不失魂》一经推出便登上《纽约时报》畅销榜。本书揭示了将伟大公司拖离创始初衷的结构性力量（"财务引力"），以及让最优秀企业得以抵御这种力量的治理设计。它为那些能够成长、繁荣并持久发展而不失灵魂的组织提供了蓝图。💬 埃里克在线问答活动 📘 面向Product Hunt的免费实施指南 incorruptible.co/resources/guide-for-ph
products.description: Instant NY Times bestseller from Eric Ries, creator of The Lean Startup. Incorruptible reveals the structural forces ("financial gravity") that pull great companies away from their founding purpose, and the governance design that lets the best ones resist it. The book offers the blueprint for organizations that can grow, prosper, and endure without losing their soul. 💬 Launch AMA with Eric 📘 Free implementation guide for Product Hunt incorruptible.co/resources/guide-for-ph

products.name: Napkin Math
products.tagline: personalized AI food journal + nutrition coach
products.summaryZh: 个性化AI饮食记录 + 营养指导
products.descriptionZh: Napkin Math 是一款个性化AI饮食记录工具，只需拍下食物照片，就能帮助用户达成健康目标。记录过程简单到让你忍不住分享给朋友。
products.description: Napkin Math is the personalized AI food journal that helps people achieve their health goals. as simple as taking a photo of your food so cute you'll share it with a friend

products.name: Monako Glass
products.tagline: Run AI coding agents hands-free from a heads-up display
products.summaryZh: 在平视显示器上免提运行AI编程代理
products.descriptionZh: Monako Glass 是一款重 48 克的可穿戴设备，运行 Buildroot Linux，配备波导显示屏、骨传导麦克风和手势输入功能。开发者可通过眼镜免提运行 Claude Code、Codex 或任意编程代理。仅限预约购买，2026 年 7 月至 8 月发货。
products.description: Monako Glass is a 48g wearable running Buildroot Linux with a waveguide display, bone conduction mic, and gesture input. Lets developers run Claude Code, Codex, or any coding agent hands-free from glasses. Reservation-only, ships July-August 2026.
